ddls:
CREATE TABLE "constants" (
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constant */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Symbol or identifier of the constant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the constant */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the constant */,
  "arxiv_ref" INTEGER /* Reference to the ArXiV source */,
  "wikipedia_ref" INTEGER /* Reference to the Wikipedia source */,
  "wikidata_ref" INTEGER /* Reference to the Wikidata source */,
  "wordwindow_ref" INTEGER /* Reference to the WordWindow source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the constant */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the constant */,
  "value" TEXT /* Numerical value of the constant */,
  "uncertainty" TEXT /* Uncertainty or error margin of the constant */,
  "last_verified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last verification of the constant */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last verified the constant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the constant is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constant was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the constant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constants_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES constant_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., global, local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the type is a standard type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., ArXiV, Wikipedia) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the reliability of the source */,
  "last_checked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check for updates */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last checked the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_sources" (
  "cs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constant-source reference */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constant */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID in the source */,
  "last_checked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check for updates */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last checked the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_sources_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_sources_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account will be unlocked after being locked out */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the constant */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constant being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the constant was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constant */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the constant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the changes */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_versions_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "constant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constant */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the related article or dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "last_checked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check for the link */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last checked the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_links_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_links_constant_id FOREIGN KEY ("constant_id") REFERENCES constants ("constant_id")
)
